arts.ttl: Liverpool begin talks with FC Nürnberg for Stefanos Tzimas
arts.sum: Liverpool have opened talks with FC Nürnberg about signing Stefanos Tzimas this summer, according to Florian Plettenberg. The Premier League club made contact via a phone call with Nürnberg a…

arts.ttl: Liverpool have to move for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia - Darwin Nunez didn't give me one thing I wanted
arts.sum: John Aldridge reacts to Liverpool's interest in Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and the Reds' FA Cup win over Accrington Stanley in the first half of his weekly ECHO column

arts.ttl: FPL: First double game of the season confirmed - as Premier League reveal new date for Everton's postponed clash with Liverpool at Goodison Park
arts.sum: Those who have yet to activate their Triple Captain chip have now been presented with a prime opportunity to use it on in-form Reds superstar Mohamed Salah.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: What Bournemouth sources say about rumours Liverpool could use Ben Doak to sign Antoine Semenyo
Premier League GW21 predictions: Arsenal, Tottenham in four-goal thriller as Liverpool, Man City triumph
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on singer-songwriter Alex Spencer for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 21 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Dominik Szoboszlai breaks silence after Liverpool return as Nottingham Forest decision looms
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as the midfielder made his return from illness against Accrington Stanley with eyes now turning to the Premier League clash vs Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Scotland full-back Ramsay makes Kilmarnock move
arts.sum: Scotland right-back Calvin Ramsay joins Kilmarnock on loan from Liverpool for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Championship trio keen on signing forgotten Nottingham Forest forward
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest forward Emmanuel Dennis has interest from three unnamed Championship clubs, as per Sky Sports’ Dharmesh Sheth.… The post Championship trio keen on signing forgotten Nottingham Forest forward appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: New date for Merseyside derby confirmed
arts.sum: The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool has been rearranged for Wednesday, February 12 after the original fixture at Goodison Park was postponed due to adverse weather conditions caused by Storm Darragh.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 3rd & Dortmund 5th - Which clubs have made most money in January since 2000?
arts.sum: It’s been a relatively slow start to the January transfer window but business is expected to gather pace over the coming weeks. Marcus Rashford is destined to leave Manchester...
